{{define "base"}} {{if .Title}}{{.Title}}{{else if .Site.Title}}{{.Site.Title}}{{else}}Untitled{{end}} {{if eq .Kind "404"}}{{end}} {{if .HasSearch}}{{end}} {{if .HasCustomCSS}}{{end}}
alpha shell marker
{{template "content" .}} {{if .HasSearch}}
{{end}} {{end}} {{define "content"}} {{if eq .Kind "note"}}{{template "content-note" .}}{{end}} {{if eq .Kind "index"}}{{template "content-index" .}}{{end}} {{if eq .Kind "tag"}}{{template "content-tag" .}}{{end}} {{if eq .Kind "folder"}}{{template "content-folder" .}}{{end}} {{if eq .Kind "timeline"}}{{template "content-timeline" .}}{{end}} {{if eq .Kind "404"}}{{template "content-404" .}}{{end}} {{end}}
